intent_summary: Deploy Field Monitor Cloudflare Workers to production and wire infrastructure. Code complete (Phases 1-5 passed, integration GO) but nothing live. Sequence: (1) Create KV namespaces PARSER_KV and EGRESS_KV via wrangler, update wrangler.toml with namespace IDs. (2) Set DATABASE_URL secret on orchestrator and proxy-router Workers (Neon from Doppler). (3) Deploy spokes FIRST (fetcher, parser-registry, proxy-router) then orchestrator LAST (service binding dependency). (4) Capture orchestrator URL. (5) Seed 1 test URL into field_monitor.url_registry + field_state + parser KV for smoke test. (6) POST single CheckTask to orchestrator /check endpoint, verify 7/7 gates, check_log row, field_state populated. Human steps required: Cloudflare API token, GitHub secrets (CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, FIELD_MONITOR_ORCHESTRATOR_URL, FIELD_MONITOR_DATABASE_URL). Go condition: 7/7 gates pass on live infrastructure with real URL.
constraints: Do not expand scope beyond Cloudflare deployment and smoke test
Deploy spokes BEFORE orchestrator — service binding dependency
Do not deploy with empty KV namespace IDs — will fail
DATABASE_URL is Neon connection string from Doppler (NEON_DATABASE_URL)
Scheduler stays dry_run=true until smoke test passes
Do not seed 100-record sample until smoke test confirms end-to-end
Human steps: Cloudflare API token + GitHub secrets — cannot be automated
